points.text: COVID-19 is a contagious disease caused by the coronavirus SARS‑CoV‑2 [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000][doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00024].
The WHO declared COVID-19 a global health emergency in March 2020 and ended the emergency in May 2023 [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000].
COVID-19 is an illness caused by the SARS‑CoV‑2 virus [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
It began spreading at the end of 2019 and became a pandemic in 2020 [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
COVID-19 is an infectious respiratory illness caused by the SARS‑CoV‑2 coronavirus; ‘CO’=corona, ‘VI’=virus, ‘D’=disease. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
